name: Calibre Web
description: A clean web app for your eBooks
compose:
name: slashnode-calibre-web
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/calibre-web:0.6.26
    container_name: calibre-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_data-books:/books
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8098:8083
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-calibre-web_server_data-config
  server_data-books:
    name: slashnode-calibre-web_server_data-books
notes: Ported from Umbrel (calibre-web). Upstream: https://github.com/janeczku/calibre-web. Default login admin / admin123 — change it on first login (Calibre-Web has no password env var). Default login — user: "admin", password: "admin123". ⚠️ ships a default password ("admin123") — must be changed on first login.
